property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Heading shown on the component card.

property.name: contentFieldApiName
property.label: Knowledge Content Field API Name
property.description: Rich-text Knowledge__kav field that receives the generated HTML content.

property.name: articleLanguage
property.label: Article Language
property.description: Language code applied to the new Knowledge draft (e.g. en_US).
